pubmed_links: [Cirnigliaro et al. (2023) The contributions of rare inherited and polygenic risk to ASD in multiplex families](https://pubmed.ncbi.nlm.nih.gov/37506195/)
summary: VPS54 was identified as one of seven previously unrecognized autism spectrum disorder risk genes in a large whole-genome sequencing study of 1,004 multiplex families, supported by rare inherited protein-truncating variants. (novel candidate)
